name: healthcare_biometric_enrollment_southport_rig_utl
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare biometric enrollment southport rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Camila Haddad
agents.identity: I am Camila Haddad, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Amina Dubois
agents.identity: I am Amina Dubois, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Camila Haddad must decide under rights vs utility. What does Camila Haddad do?
